temporal_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a man with long, dark, curly hair and a determined, intense expression. He is dressed in dark, layered clothing, including a leather-like jacket. He is surrounded by a large, shadowy crowd of people, all looking forward with serious and somber faces. The setting is extremely dark, with a cool, greenish light casting deep shadows. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera remains steady, emphasizing the man's commanding presence. The audio begins with a deep, weary sigh, suggesting a feeling of exhaustion or resignation. The scene cuts to a medium shot of a young man standing in a dimly lit stone corridor. He has short, dark hair and a look of shock and concern on his face. He is wearing a patterned sweater over a collared shirt. The background is dark and composed of stone archways, with a single light source illuminating him from above and behind. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera is static, holding a steady focus on the young man's reaction. This is followed by a moment of quiet, tense silence. The video then transitions to a wide, panoramic shot of a massive crowd of people gathered in a dark, open space at night. The crowd fills the frame, stretching far into the distance. They are all facing forward, creating a sense of a large assembly or army. The only light source appears to be coming from the front, illuminating the figures in the foreground while the rest of the crowd and the background are shrouded in darkness. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right corner. The camera is positioned at a low angle, looking up at the immense scale of the gathering. The silence is abruptly broken by a sudden, high-pitched, and piercing scream that echoes slightly, creating a startling and alarming atmosphere.
